message:
fix: graceful shutdown emits SESSION_END before subagent cleanup (GAP-9.11B/C)

Reorder Close() to match spec Appendix B graceful shutdown:
1. Set state CLOSED
2. Cancel in-flight LLM
3. Emit SESSION_END
4. Close subagents
5. Close MCP
6. env.Cleanup()
7. Close events channel

Previously SESSION_END was emitted after all cleanup, which meant
consumers could not observe shutdown-in-progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
